name: Breakaway Vegetable Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cut the biscuits into quarters.
2. Dip each piece in butter.
3. Layer one-third of the biscuits in a lightly greased 10-inch Bundt pan.
4. Sprinkle with half each of bacon, cheese, onion, and green pepper.
5. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, ending with biscuits.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes or until done.
Yield: one 10-inch ring.
